text: Sealed into a one-person tunnel pod. It is exactly one person sized. The backpack disagrees.
Pod launched into the tunnel system. Acceleration: rude. Snacks: unsecured.
Hurtling through pitch-black tunnels. Something scraped the hull. The pod's speaker played a calming chime, badly.
The pod intercom crackled: 'Arrival in T-minus soon.' Reassuring. Specific.
Passed another pod going the opposite direction at speed. Brief eye contact through two layers of scratched plexiglass. A bond was formed.
Remembered the thing they forgot in Desperanza. The pod does not have a reverse gear. Noted for next time.
